narrative:
Congress Township has 2,851 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.4 percentage points.
